text: The stark emptiness of the first space makes me feel quiet and a little uneasy, as if I'm waiting for something to happen. Entering the second room, surrounded by vibrant colors and thought-provoking words, I feel a spark of curiosity and engagement. I'm drawn to the juxtaposition—outside, a blank slate; inside, a playground of ideas. I sense the promise of learning, the excitement of innovation—and the quiet hum of possibility all around me.
